name: car
prompt: {"subjects": [], "background_setting": "A vibrant red convertible with a black fabric top parked on a paved driveway, blending vintage 1950s styling with modern automotive design. Prominent chrome front bumpers, circular headlights set in silver-rimmed housings, and dual chrome hood ornaments mirror the sharp flared tailfins at the rear. Modern five-spoke alloy wheels with low-profile tires sit beneath the body; a silver trim strip runs along the side profile, ending near a small 'SS' badge on the rear quarter panel. In the background, a landscaped garden features a multi-tiered rock waterfall cascading into a small pond, framed by thick green foliage and tall pine trees behind a black iron fence.", "lighting": {"conditions": "Bright, overhead daylight from a clear sky.", "direction": "Sunlight from high above, raking down across the hood and reflecting off the polished metallic body.", "shadows": "Sharp, defined shadows beneath the car and beside the iron fence; softer shadows under the surrounding foliage.", "illumination_effect": "Crisp, high-contrast daylight that emphasizes the saturated red paint and reflective chrome accents."}, "aesthetics": {"composition": "Low-perspective three-quarter view of the car occupying the foreground; landscaped garden and waterfall fill the background.", "color_scheme": "Vibrant red and chrome of the car contrasted with the deep greens of foliage and grey stone of the waterfall.", "mood_atmosphere": "Showcase, polished, nostalgic — a meticulously maintained classic in a tranquil garden setting."}, "cinematography": {"camera_motion": "Slow, steady forward push with a slight orbit toward the front of the car.", "framing": "Wide shot capturing the full body of the car along with the garden behind.", "camera_angle": "Low, slightly below the hood line, looking up at the car at a three-quarter angle.", "depth_of_field": "Moderate, with the car in sharp focus and the foliage and waterfall softly defocused.", "focus": "Sharp focus on the front of the car; background gradually softer.", "lens_focal_length": "Standard"}, "style_medium": "Live-action video", "artistic_style": "Realistic, automotive showcase", "context": "Showcase shot of a vintage-styled red convertible in a garden setting", "actions": [{"time": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Camera glides slowly forward and slightly around the parked car as reflections on its polished paint subtly shift and water cascades in the background pond."}], "text_and_signage_elements": [{"text": "SS", "category": "vehicle_badge", "appearance": "Small chrome 'SS' lettering on the rear quarter panel.", "spatial_temporal": "Static placement on the body of the car, visible throughout.", "context": "Model designation badge on the convertible."}], "segments": [{"segment_index": 0, "time_range": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Slow forward push around the parked red convertible in the garden.", "key_changes": "Continuous slow camera motion; shifting highlights on chrome and red paint; gentle cascade of water in the background.", "camera": "Slow dolly forward with slight orbit, low three-quarter angle, standard lens"}], "transitions": [], "temporal_caption": "The scene opens with a low, three-quarter-angle wide shot of a vibrant red convertible parked on a paved driveway, captured with a standard lens in moderate depth of field. The chrome front bumpers, circular headlights, and dual hood ornaments catch the bright overhead daylight, while the sharp flared tailfins and silver side trim are clearly visible. In the background, a multi-tiered rock waterfall cascades into a small pond, framed by lush green foliage and tall pine trees behind a black iron fence. From 0.0 to 2.5 seconds, the camera begins a slow forward push with a gentle orbit around the front of the car; sunlit highlights subtly shift along the polished red bodywork and chrome trim, and the cascading water continues its steady flow in the softly defocused background. From 2.5 to 5.0 seconds, the camera maintains its measured drift, bringing more of the car's profile and the 'SS' badge into view; reflections continue to play across the paint, the pond water keeps cascading, and the surrounding foliage remains gently still through to the end of the clip."}

name: greatwall
prompt: {"subjects": [], "background_setting": "The Great Wall of China stretches across a steep, rugged mountain ridge, constructed from weathered grey stone blocks and bricks that wind into the distance. The top of the wall serves as a wide, paved walkway lined with crenellated battlements. A prominent rectangular watchtower with arched windows and a traditional gabled roof stands at a bend in the path; beyond it, the wall narrows and ascends a sharp incline toward several smaller, distant watchtowers perched higher on the peaks. The surrounding landscape is densely covered in a forest of trees and shrubs in rust-orange, deep gold, and brownish-green autumn foliage. Above, a bright blue sky is streaked with thin, wispy white clouds.", "lighting": {"conditions": "Bright, direct overhead midday sunlight under a mostly clear autumn sky.", "direction": "Sun high overhead and slightly behind the camera, illuminating the stone walkway and the front faces of the watchtowers.", "shadows": "Sharp, dark shadows from the crenellations cast across the sunlit stone floor; deeper shadows within the forest below.", "illumination_effect": "High-contrast, crisp daylight emphasizing the textures of weathered masonry and the warm autumn foliage."}, "aesthetics": {"composition": "Strong leading line of the wall winding from the foreground into the distant peaks; the watchtower anchors the mid-ground.", "color_scheme": "Warm rust-orange, gold, and brown of the autumn foliage contrasted with cool grey stone and vivid blue sky.", "mood_atmosphere": "Grand, historic, awe-inspiring — a monumental fortification at peace under autumn light."}, "cinematography": {"camera_motion": "Slow, steady forward drift along the line of the wall, with a very gentle vertical lift.", "framing": "Extra-wide landscape shot capturing the wall, watchtower, and distant peaks.", "camera_angle": "Slightly elevated, looking down and forward along the wall.", "depth_of_field": "Deep focus across the entire landscape.", "focus": "Sharp focus from the foreground walkway to the most distant towers.", "lens_focal_length": "Wide-angle"}, "style_medium": "Live-action aerial cinematography", "artistic_style": "Cinematic, realistic landscape", "context": "Establishing aerial shot of the Great Wall of China in autumn", "actions": [{"time": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Camera drifts slowly forward along the wall toward the distant watchtowers; thin clouds shift overhead and autumn foliage stirs gently in a light breeze."}], "text_and_signage_elements": [], "segments": [{"segment_index": 0, "time_range": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Aerial drift along the Great Wall winding through autumn-colored mountains.", "key_changes": "Continuous slow forward camera motion; subtle shifting of thin clouds; gentle rustling of autumn foliage.", "camera": "Aerial dolly forward with gentle lift, wide-angle, slightly elevated view"}], "transitions": [], "temporal_caption": "The scene opens with an extra-wide, slightly elevated landscape shot of the Great Wall of China, captured in deep focus with a wide-angle lens. The weathered grey stone walkway lined with crenellated battlements leads from the foreground into the distance, where a rectangular watchtower with arched windows and a traditional gabled roof anchors the mid-ground. Beyond, the wall narrows and ascends toward smaller watchtowers perched on rugged peaks. Surrounding forests blaze with rust-orange, deep gold, and brownish-green autumn foliage, while a bright blue sky streaked with wispy white clouds spans overhead. From 0.0 to 2.5 seconds, the camera begins a slow, steady forward drift along the line of the wall with a very gentle vertical lift; the crenellations cast sharp shadows on the sunlit stone floor, and thin clouds shift almost imperceptibly across the sky. From 2.5 to 5.0 seconds, the camera continues its measured forward motion, bringing the watchtower and distant peaks slightly closer; the autumn foliage stirs gently in a light breeze, the cloud streaks continue their subtle drift, and the overall composition retains its sense of grandeur and historic scale through to the end of the clip."}

name: bridge
prompt: {"subjects": [], "background_setting": "A worn stone packhorse bridge with scattered fallen leaves crosses a calm, reflective river where several ducks swim. Beyond the bridge, a quaint village square is lined with traditional Cotswold stone buildings and a half-timbered structure; a large tree displays vibrant autumn leaves. A period lamppost stands near the bridge, and on the right side of the square, an outdoor seating area sits beneath rolled-up pink umbrellas with green waste bins nearby.", "lighting": {"conditions": "Soft, diffuse natural daylight from an overcast or lightly clouded sky.", "direction": "Even, ambient illumination from above with no strong directional source.", "shadows": "Soft, gentle shadows {"composition": "Stone bridge as a foreground anchor leading the eye across the river to the village square in the mid-ground.", "color_scheme": "Warm stone beige, autumn orange and gold of foliage, {"camera_motion": "Slow, steady forward dolly across the bridge toward the village square.", "framing": "Wide shot capturing both the bridge and the village beyond.", "camera_angle": "Eye-level, "lens_focal_length": "Standard to slight wide-angle"}, "style_medium": "Live-action video", "artistic_style": "Realistic, picturesque", "context": "Establishing shot of a traditional English Cotswold village in autumn", "actions": [{"time": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Camera glides slowly across the bridge toward the village while ducks swim gently in the river and a few leaves drift through the air."}], "text_and_signage_elements": [], "segments": [{"segment_index": 0, "time_range": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Forward dolly across the stone bridge toward a Cotswold village square with deep focus, standard lens"}], "transitions": [], "temporal_caption": "The scene opens with a wide, eye-level shot of a worn stone packhorse bridge crossing a calm, reflective river, captured in deep focus with a standard lens. Scattered autumn leaves lie across the bridge's stone surface, and several ducks swim slowly in the river below. Beyond the bridge, a quaint village square is lined with traditional Cotswold stone buildings and a half-timbered structure; a large tree blazes with vibrant autumn foliage, and a period lamppost stands near the riverbank. To the right, outdoor seating sits beneath rolled-up pink umbrellas, with green waste bins nearby. Soft, diffuse daylight from an overcast sky brings out the warm stone and foliage tones. From 0.0 to 2.5 seconds, the camera begins a slow, steady forward dolly toward the village square; the ducks paddle gently across the water's reflective surface, and a few leaves drift down through the air. From 2.5 to 5.0 seconds, the camera continues its measured glide, bringing the lamppost and storefronts progressively closer; the ducks' gentle motion ripples the water, the reflections subtly shift, and the surrounding light, foliage, and stonework remain calm and picturesque through to the end of the clip."}

name: indoor

name: office
prompt: {"subjects": [], "background_setting": "An empty modern office interior with rows of identical cubicles arranged in parallel lines. Each cubicle contains a desk with a flat-panel computer monitor, keyboard, mouse, and an ergonomic office chair tucked in. The floor is covered in low-pile gray carpet, and the partitions are upholstered in muted fabric panels. A wall of floor-to-ceiling windows along the right side reveals mature deciduous trees outside, their green leaves visible against a softly overcast sky. Drop ceiling tiles and recessed light fixtures span overhead.", "lighting": {"conditions": "Bright, evenly diffused overhead fluorescent and LED panel lighting throughout the office.", "direction": "Top-down from ceiling fixtures, with additional ambient daylight from the right-hand windows.", "shadows": "Soft, minimal shadows beneath desks and cubicle partitions due to the diffuse overhead light.", "illumination_effect": "Cool, neutral-white light producing a clean, professional, slightly clinical atmosphere."}, "aesthetics": {"composition": "Strong one-point linear perspective with a central vanishing point down the cubicle aisle.", "color_scheme": "Cool grays, whites, and beiges of office furniture contrasted with the muted green of trees through the windows.", "mood_atmosphere": "Quiet, organized, contemplative — a modern workspace at rest with no human activity."}, "cinematography": {"camera_motion": "Smooth, continuous dolly forward along the central aisle of the cubicle floor.", "framing": "Wide shot capturing the full depth and breadth of the office.", "camera_angle": "Eye-level for a standing person, parallel to the floor.", "depth_of_field": "Deep focus, with the full length of the office rendered sharply.", "focus": "Sharp focus throughout, emphasizing the orderly geometry of the workspace.", "lens_focal_length": "Wide-angle"}, "style_medium": "Live-action video", "artistic_style": "Realistic, documentary", "context": "Architectural walkthrough of an unoccupied office space", "actions": [{"time": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Camera glides forward smoothly through the empty office, passing rows of cubicles on both sides."}], "text_and_signage_elements": [], "segments": [{"segment_index": 0, "time_range": "0:00-0:05", "description": "Camera moves smoothly forward through the empty office aisle, with identical cubicles on both sides.", "key_changes": "Continuous forward camera motion; The camera begins a smooth, continuous dolly forward along the central aisle, gliding past parallel rows of cubicles on either side. From 0.0 to 2.5 seconds, the camera continues its steady forward glide, the cubicles streaming past in clean one-point linear perspective with a strong central vanishing point.
